title: Dynamic Profile Card 🪪
description: Extract data from a JavaScript Object and format it beautifully using Template Literals and the DOM.

tasks.instruction: Create an object named `user` with two properties: `name` (set to 'Alice') and `role` (set to 'Developer').

validationRules.errorMessage: Ensure you create a user object with name 'Alice' and role 'Developer'.

tasks.instruction:
Use ES6 Template Literals (backticks) to create a multi-line string variable named `cardHTML` that displays the user's name in an `

` and role in a `

` tag.
tasks.initialCode:
const user = { name: 'Alice', role: 'Developer' };
// Create cardHTML string below

validationRules.errorMessage: Use backticks ` ` to inject ${user.name} into an h1 and ${user.role} into a p tag.

tasks.instruction: Select the empty HTML div with the ID '#card-container' and save it in a variable called `container`.

validationRules.errorMessage: Use document.querySelector on '#card-container' and assign it to container.

tasks.instruction: Inject your literal `cardHTML` string directly into the DOM using the `container.innerHTML` property.

validationRules.errorMessage: Assign the cardHTML string to the container.innerHTML property.
